item.title: Deep-Fried Stuffed Bites for Crispy Texture
item.description: Josh Elkin deep fries stuffed bites for an ultra-crispy finish, delivering a comfort-food recipe with a crunchy shell and indulgent filling.

media:content.media:title: Deep-Fried Stuffed Bites for Crispy Texture
media:content.media:description: Josh Elkin deep fries stuffed bites for an ultra-crispy finish, delivering a comfort-food recipe with a crunchy shell and indulgent filling.

item.title: Cream Cheese Egg Mixture Hack
item.description: A smooth stream of cream cheese goes straight into the egg mixture for a rich, creamy base. A simple cooking hack with big comfort-food appeal.

media:content.media:title: Cream Cheese Egg Mixture Hack
media:content.media:description: A smooth stream of cream cheese goes straight into the egg mixture for a rich, creamy base. A simple cooking hack with big comfort-food appeal.

item.title: Rolled-Up Eggs Benedict
item.description: Playful take on Eggs Benedict with rich, comforting layers and a polished finish. Recipe in comments.

media:content.media:title: Rolled-Up Eggs Benedict
media:content.media:description: Playful take on Eggs Benedict with rich, comforting layers and a polished finish. Recipe in comments.

item.title: Ultimate Savory Bundt Cake
item.description: A creative savory bundt cake from Josh Elkin, bringing a fun layered bake with comforting flavor and an eye-catching presentation.

media:content.media:title: Ultimate Savory Bundt Cake
media:content.media:description: A creative savory bundt cake from Josh Elkin, bringing a fun layered bake with comforting flavor and an eye-catching presentation.

item.title: Savory Breakfast Bundt Cake
item.description: A comforting breakfast bake with a fun bundt shape, bringing savory flavor and an easy, shareable twist to the morning table.

media:content.media:title: Savory Breakfast Bundt Cake
media:content.media:description: A comforting breakfast bake with a fun bundt shape, bringing savory flavor and an easy, shareable twist to the morning table.

item.title: Guess the Dish, Get the Ingredients
item.description: Follow along on Snapchat, guess what Josh Elkin is cooking, and you might get an Instacart to make it at home.

media:content.media:title: Guess the Dish, Get the Ingredients
media:content.media:description: Follow along on Snapchat, guess what Josh Elkin is cooking, and you might get an Instacart to make it at home.

item.title: Lasagna Stuffed Garlic Bread
item.description: A comforting fusion of lasagna and garlic bread, packed into one cheesy, layered bite.

media:content.media:title: Lasagna Stuffed Garlic Bread
media:content.media:description: A comforting fusion of lasagna and garlic bread, packed into one cheesy, layered bite.

item.title: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes
item.description: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes bring a fun, layered twist to classic pizza flavors with crisp tortillas, melty cheese, and savory pepperoni.

media:content.media:title: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes
media:content.media:description: Pepperoni Pizza Tortilla Cupcakes bring a fun, layered twist to classic pizza flavors with crisp tortillas, melty cheese, and savory pepperoni.
